name: CBC Holding Company
summary: CBC Holding Company operates as the holding company for Community Banking Company of Fitzgerald that provides various banking products and services to individuals and businesses in Georgia. It offers demand deposits, savings accounts, checking accounts, NOW accounts, money market accounts, certificates of deposit, other time deposits, and individual retirement accounts. The company also provides mortgage, home equity, and personal loans, as well as commercial loans, such as commercial real estate loans, term loans, lines of credit, letters of credit, agricultural loans, small business administration loans, and construction loans. In addition, it offers online and mobile banking, telephone banking, bill pay, merchant card, debit card, payments, safe deposit box, night deposit, cashier's check, ACH origination, and remote deposit services. The company was incorporated in 1996 and is based in Fitzgerald, Georgia.
